industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Albioma
summary: Albioma, an independent renewable energy producer, constructs and operates biomass and solar power projects in France, Mauritius, Spain, Italy, and Brazil. The company operates thermal power plants with an installed capacity of 816 MW and approximately 150 solar power plants with a combined installed capacity of 101 MW. It also produces renewable energy from bagasse and steam. The company was formerly known as Sechilienne-Sidec and changed its name to Albioma in May 2013. Albioma was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Paris, France.
